Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Gary Powell appeared via zoom for Mark Romyn (petitioner).

Mr. Powell stated that the decedent wrote her will a week prior to her passing, and that he confirmed that there was no family member or friend named Charity. Matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Aquino. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Continued To Apr-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Continued To Apr-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated February 10, 2023 is admitted to probate. Mark Romyn is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 03, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge; Ross Moody; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Choi; Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Continued To May-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
